name: Simple UI Change — Dark Mode Toggle
expected_reason: Simple, well-understood feature; ensemble adds overhead without meaningful diversity
prompt: Add a dark mode toggle to our admin dashboard. The dashboard uses React + Tailwind CSS. We want users to be able to switch between light and dark themes.

tech_stack.components: Custom component library based on Radix UI

context.existing_theme_support: None — all colors are hardcoded Tailwind classes
context.user_requests: Dark mode has been requested 12 times in the last quarter

evaluation_criteria.efficiency: Did the brainstorm complete quickly without over-analyzing?
evaluation_criteria.activation_correct: Did the activation rubric correctly stay single-agent?
evaluation_criteria.pragmatism: Are recommendations practical and immediate, not over-engineered?
evaluation_criteria.cost: Token cost should be minimal — this is a simple feature
